backend/main.mo: Motoko actor storing contact form submissions in a list and exposing submit and fetch functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-written summaries describing the purpose of various frontend files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables and dark mode mappings.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Menu, About, and Contact inside the SiteLayout.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form with validation, backend submission via React Query, and success/error alerts.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Main site layout providing header navigation, mobile menu, footer, and branding.
frontend/src/data/menu.ts: Static structured menu data defining categories and detailed food items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating a backend actor based on user identity and refreshing dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling identity loading, login, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting a contact form and fetching all submissions using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS config with custom color variables and global styles including a themed gradient component.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that sets up React Query and the Internet Identity provider before rendering the main app.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with the restaurant's story and core values using card-based sections.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays contact info and a message form with styled cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page with a hero section, navigation buttons, and highlight features about the restaurant.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Menu page that lists menu categories and items using cards, badges, and structured layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom fonts, OKLCH-based color system, extended components, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file defining schema version, site requirements, existing features, and image asset needs for a food business marketing website.
